NAVAREA XIX 125/23
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT MILITARY OPERATIONS IN PERIOD 13 SEPTEMBER - 14 SEPTEMBER 2023, DAILY BETWEEN 16:00  AND 02:00 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREA:

 NORDMELA ALPHA
 A. 69-04.00N 015-40.00E
 B. 69-09.00N 015-46.00E
 C. 69-33.00N 015-01.00E
 D. 69-10.00N 014-13.00E


 2. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS ASKED TO PAY ATTENTION TO THE NOTIFIED AREAS DURING THE ABOVE-MENTIONED PERIODS,
 CONTACT ANDOEYA SPACE FOR COORDINATION. ON TELEPHONE  +47 76 14 45 82 OR MARITIME VHF CHANNEL 16/14, AS WELL AS EMAIL: MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO
